hooks.command: powershell -Command "Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; $notify = New-Object System.Windows.Forms.NotifyIcon; $notify.Icon = [System.Drawing.SystemIcons]::Information; $notify.Visible = $true; $notify.ShowBalloonTip(5000, 'Claude Code', 'All tasks completed!', [System.Windows.Forms.ToolTipIcon]::Info); Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $notify.Dispose()"
